Regarding the Morimens Raid Anniversary cap issue from about a year ago, I’ve seen that some people are still concerned about it, and others are hearing about it for the first time. I previously explained my thoughts in Chinese in the community, and I’d like to share them here in English as well for everyone’s reference and understanding:

It was indeed a serious mistake. At the time, I kept trying to adjust the event structure and reward pacing to make the anniversary feel more exciting and meaningful. Because of that, I lost sight of what the community actually needed and expected. Raising the cap from 50k to 60k wasn’t enough, and releasing three bosses in a single day only made things worse. I still regret those decisions to this day. What I can do now is focus on designing events properly, in line with the game’s core values and with respect for everyone’s time and experience, as a way to respond to all of you and make up for what happened.
